SORA-AERIAL_SWEEP.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Gain 1 [gold]SP[/gold] for each enemy hit.
SORA-AERIAL_SWEEP.title: Aerial Sweep
SORA-SLAPSHOT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Gain {BlockPerEnemy:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] for each enemy hit.
SORA-SLAPSHOT.title: Slapshot
SORA-DAMAGE_CONTROL.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Heal HP equal to {HealPercent:diff()}% of your missing HP.
SORA-DAMAGE_CONTROL.title: Damage Control
SORA-TREASURE_HUNTER.title: Treasure Hunter
SORA-FORMCHANGE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Gain [gold]Ultimate Form[/gold] for 3 turns. 
If already in [gold]Ultimate Form[/gold], extend it by 2 turns instead.
SORA-FORMCHANGE.title: Formchange
SORA-ULTIMATE_COMBO.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Gain [gold]Ultimate Form[/gold] for 2 turns. 
If already in [gold]Ultimate Form[/gold], extend it by 1 turn instead.
SORA-ULTIMATE_COMBO.title: Ultimate Combo
SORA-HEART_RECOVERY.description:
Gain [gold]Kairi's Link[/gold] for 3 turns. 
All [gold]Skills[/gold] in your hand cost 0 this turn.
SORA-HEART_RECOVERY.title: Heart Recovery
SORA-KINGS_GUIDANCE.title: King's Guidance
SORA-NEGATIVE_COMBO.description:
Reduce [gold]SP[/gold] gained per turn by 1. 
Gain {NegativeComboPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] each turn.
SORA-NEGATIVE_COMBO.title: Negative Combo
SORA-SEVEN_LIGHTS.description: The first time you play a [gold]Companion[/gold] card each turn, gain 1 [gold]Energy[/gold].
SORA-SEVEN_LIGHTS.title: Seven Lights
SORA-SYNCH_BLADE.description: Whenever you play an [gold]Attack[/gold], deal {SynchBladePower:diff()} damage to a random enemy.
SORA-SYNCH_BLADE.title: Synch Blade
SORA-DUAL_WIELD.description: Each turn, the first [gold]Attack[/gold] card you play is played an additional time.
SORA-DUAL_WIELD.title: Dual Wield
SORA-FINISH_BOOST.description: The third [gold]Attack[/gold] you play each turn deals {FinishBoostPower:diff()}% more damage.
SORA-FINISH_BOOST.title: Finish Boost
SORA-ONE_HEART.title: One Heart
SORA-YENSIDS_BLESSING.description: At the start of your turn, upgrade a random card in your hand.
SORA-YENSIDS_BLESSING.title: Yen Sid's Blessing
SORA-SITUATION_BOOST.description: Whenever you play a card that costs 2 or more [gold]Energy[/gold], gain 5 [gold]SP[/gold].
SORA-SITUATION_BOOST.title: Situation Boost
SORA-BOND_OF_LIGHT.description: Each time you play a [gold]Companion[/gold] card, draw 1 card.
SORA-BOND_OF_LIGHT.title: Bond of Light
SORA-STRIKE_SORA.title: Strike
SORA-FULL_COMBO.title: Full Combo
SORA-ARS_ARCANUM.title: Ars Arcanum
SORA-DEFEND_SORA.title: Defend
SORA-SONIC_BLADE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies. 
Consume 30 [gold]SP[/gold].
SORA-SONIC_BLADE.title: Sonic Blade
SORA-ULTIMATE_FINISHER.title: UltimateFinisher
SORA-SITUATION_COMMAND.title: Situation Command
SORA-ULTIMATE_FORM.title: Ultimate Form
SORA-FIRE.title: Fire
SORA-JACKPOT.title: Jackpot
SORA-REFLECT.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Blocked damage is reflected back to the attacker for 1 turn.
SORA-REFLECT.title: Reflect
SORA-REFLEGA.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Blocked damage is reflected back to the attacker for 1 turn.
SORA-REFLEGA.title: Reflega
SORA-COUNTERGUARD.title: Counterguard
SORA-BLITZ.title: Blitz
SORA-SONIC_STRIKE.title: Sonic Strike
SORA-BLIZZARD.title: Blizzard
SORA-DODGE_ROLL.title: Dodge Roll
SORA-THUNDER.title: Thunder
SORA-SLIDING_DASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Reduce this card's cost to 0 {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SORA-SLIDING_DASH.title: Sliding Dash
SORA-COMBO_PLUS.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage for each Attack already played this turn.{InCombat:
(Hits {CalculatedHits:diff()} {CalculatedHits:plural:time|times})|}
SORA-COMBO_PLUS.title: Combo Plus
SORA-QUICK_SLASH.title: Quick Slash
SORA-AERIAL_DODGE.title: Aerial Dodge
SORA-COMBO_BOOST.title: Combo Boost
SORA-EXPLOSION.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to random enemies [gold]{Repeat:diff()}[/gold] times.
SORA-EXPLOSION.title: Explosion
SORA-GUARDBREAK.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Deal [gold]50%[/gold] more damage to [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemies.
SORA-GUARDBREAK.title: Guard Break
SORA-POWER_OF_WAKING.description: At the start of your turn, return a random [gold]Attack[/gold] card from your discard pile to your hand.
SORA-POWER_OF_WAKING.title: Power Of Waking
SORA-THUNDAGA.title: Thundaga
SORA-FIRAGA.title: Firaga
SORA-BLIZZAGA.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold] to ALL enemies.
SORA-BLIZZAGA.title: Blizzaga
SORA-COMBO_MASTER.title: Combo Master
SORA-AERIAL_RECOVERY.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Draw 1 card. 
If you draw a Skill, gain {SituationReadyPower:diff()} [gold]SP[/gold].
SORA-AERIAL_RECOVERY.title: Aerial Recovery
SORA-BERSERK_CHARGE.description: ALL Attack cards in your Hand are free to play this turn.
SORA-BERSERK_CHARGE.title: Berserk Charge
SORA-BRANDISH.description:
Gain {VigorPower:diff()} [gold]Vigor[/gold]. 
If you have played fewer than 3 cards this turn, draw 1 card.
SORA-BRANDISH.title: Brandish
SORA-FLOW_MOTION.description:
Draw 2 cards. 
If at least one is an Attack, gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
SORA-FLOW_MOTION.title: Flow Motion
SORA-SEAL_KEYHOLE.title: Seal The Keyhole
SORA-FALLING_SLASH.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Play a random Attack from your Draw Pile.
SORA-FALLING_SLASH.title: Falling Slash
SORA-DODGE_SLASH.title: Dodge Slash
SORA-DAMAGE_SYPHON.description: Gain [gold]SP[/gold] equal to half of damage taken.
SORA-DAMAGE_SYPHON.title: Damage Syphon
SORA-CLOUD_LIMIT.title: CloudLimit
SORA-KAIRI_LIMIT.title: Destiny Bond
SORA-RIKU_LIMIT.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage. 
Double the enemy's [gold]Vulnerable[/gold]. 
Consume 60 [gold]SP[/gold].
SORA-RIKU_LIMIT.title: Eternal Session
SORA-RIKU_KAIRI_LIMIT.title: Ragnarok
SORA-SHADOW_STRIKE.title: Shadow Strike
SORA-DARK_FIRAGA.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies. 
Gain [gold]Riku's Link[/gold].
SORA-DARK_FIRAGA.title: Dark Firaga
SORA-DARK_SONIC.title: Dark Sonic
SORA-SHADOW_BARRIER.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Next turn, gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
Gain [gold]Riku's Link[/gold].
SORA-SHADOW_BARRIER.title: Shadow Barrier
SORA-KEYBLADE_MASTERY.title: Keyblade Mastery
SORA-LUCKY_EMBLEM.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Permanently increase this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by {Increase:diff()}.
SORA-LUCKY_EMBLEM.title: Lucky Emblem
SORA-SECOND_CHANCE.description: The first time you gain [gold]Block[/gold] from a card each turn, double the amount gained.
SORA-SECOND_CHANCE.title: Second Chance
SORA-MY_FRIENDS_ARE_MY_POWER.description: Attacks deal 1 additional damage for each active [gold]Link[/gold].
SORA-MY_FRIENDS_ARE_MY_POWER.title: My Friends Are My Power!
SORA-ONCE_MORE.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. 
If you have less than [gold]50%[/gold] HP, gain {SituationReadyPower:diff()} [gold]SP[/gold].
SORA-ONCE_MORE.title: Once More
